history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing right (`>`). The cell directly in front of me is C02, which is lava (`L`). I cannot move forward. To navigate towards the goal at H08, I need to go down column B. Turning right will orient me to face down (`v`), which will allow me to move into a safe floor cell at B03.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing down (`v`). The cell ahead is B03, which is a floor (`.`). Moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal at H08.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at B03, facing down. The cell immediately ahead is B04, which is a floor. It is safe to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04, column B, facing down. The cell below is B05, which is lava (L). I cannot move forward. The cell to the left (A04) is floor, and to the right (C04) is lava. To safely move to A04, I need to face left. Since I am facing down, turning right will make me face left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now at B04 facing left. The cell ahead is A04, which is floor. Safe to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at B04 facing left, but A04 is a wall (`#`), so I cannot move forward. To navigate towards the goal at H08, I need to go down. Turning left will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at B04 facing down. The cell ahead is B05, which is floor. Safe to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at B05 facing down. The cell ahead is B06, which is floor. Safe to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at B06 facing down. The cell below (B07) is floor, but if I go down to B07, I cannot move right because C07 is lava. My goal is H08, and I see a safe path: go right from B06 through row 06 (C06, D06, E06, F06 are all floor), then down at F07, then right to H07, then down to H08. I need to change direction to right to start this path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at B06 facing left. I need to face right to move along row 06 towards the goal path. I will turn right to face down, then next turn right again to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I need to face right to move along row 06. A single right turn from up will make me face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at B06 facing right. The immediate cells to the right are safe: C06 is empty, D06 empty, E06 empty, F06 empty. G06 is lava, so I cannot go all the way. My plan is to move right to F06, then go down to F07, then right to H07, then down to the goal at H08. My first step: move forward to C06.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
Continue moving right along row 06. Move forward to D06.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell D06 facing right (>). The goal is at H08. The cell directly ahead to the right is E06, which is floor. However, row 06 has lava at G06, blocking a direct horizontal path to H08. I need to move downward to row 07 or 08 to bypass the lava. I cannot move down while facing right, so I must turn to face down. Turning right (clockwise) will change my orientation from right to down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at D06 facing down. The cell directly ahead (D07) is floor, which is safe. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal, as I can then navigate right on row 07 to H07 and then down to H08.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at D07 facing down. The cell ahead (D08) is floor, but moving down to row 8 would not help reach the goal because lava at G08 blocks the path to H08 on that row. The better route is to go right on row 7 to H07, then down to H08. To face right from down, I must turn left (counter-clockwise).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at D07 facing right. The cell ahead (E07) is floor and safe. Moving forward takes me closer to H07, from where I can reach the goal at H08.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at E07 facing right. The path ahead is clear: F07, G07, H07 are all floor. Moving forward to F07 brings me closer to the goal at H08.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at F07 facing right. The cell ahead is G07, which is floor and safe. Moving forward brings me closer to the goal at H08.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at G07 facing right. The cell ahead is H07, which is floor and safe. Moving forward brings me directly adjacent to the goal cell H08, which is below H07. After this move, I will need to turn right to face down to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at H07 facing right, but the cell ahead (I07) is a wall. The goal is at H08, directly below me. I need to turn to face down. From facing right, turning right (clockwise) will orient me downward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at H07 facing down (`v`). The goal is at H08, directly ahead. Moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
